description: A junior engineer exported the FZK-Haus IFC model, but the export settings were misconfigured, resulting in a 'flat' spatial structure where all walls, slabs, doors, and windows are located in the IfcBuilding root and all IfcBuildingStorey entities are missing. Reconstruct the spatial hierarchy by creating two IfcBuildingStorey entities: 'Ground Floor' (Elevation: 0.0m) and 'First Floor' (Elevation: 2.8m). Reassign all elements belonging to the lower level (Z < 2.5m) to the Ground Floor and all elements belonging to the upper level (Z >= 2.5m) to the First Floor. Ensure the IfcBuilding root contains no direct elements and all components are correctly assigned to their respective storeys. Save the repaired model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_repaired.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=80. Anti-gaming: dumping all elements into one storey yields max 75 pts.
